'''[https://www.instagram.com/ultragear_gaming/ LG Ultragear]''' present the fourth season of the BGMI invitational tournament ''TEC BGMI Invitational'' called the '''''TEC BGMI Invitational Season 4''''' with a prize pool of ₹15,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Fritzz|b1flag=in|b1name=Divyanshu Saxena |b2=Sam |b3=SardarjiYT }} ===Format=== * '''Group Stage:''' ''June 6th - 13th, 2022 ** 4 groups, each consists of 8 teams. ** Maps: [[Erangel]] & [[Miramar]] ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} of each group advance to ''Grand Finals''. * '''Grand Finals:''' ''June 15th - 16th, 2022 ** 16 teams. ** 10 matches, 5 matches per day. ====Points Distribution==== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System|killterm=finish}} ====Match Days==== * 6 Matchdays: ** June 6th: A{{Abbr|vs|versus}}B (2 matches) & C{{Abbr|vs|versus}}D (2 matches) ** June 7th: A{{Abbr|vs|versus}}C (2 matches) & B{{Abbr|vs|versus}}D (2 matches) ** June 8th: B{{Abbr|vs|versus}}C (2 matches) & A{{Abbr|vs|versus}}D (2 matches) ** June 13th: A{{Abbr|vs|versus}}B, A{{Abbr|vs|versus}}C, B{{Abbr|vs|versus}}C, B{{Abbr|vs|versus}}D, C{{Abbr|vs|versus}}D ** June 15th & 16th: Grand Finals (Erangel >> Miramar >> Erangel >> Miramar >> Erangel) ==Prize Pool== ₹14,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} (≃ $17,968 {{Abbr/USD}}) are spread among the teams and the players as seen
